title: Premium Heavy Duty Clear Plastic Cutlery Set 100pcs – Reusable & Dishwasher Safe 100 Forks, 100 Spoons, 100 Knives – Ideal for Parties, Weddings, Events, Picnics, Office & Everyday Use
features: Complete Cutlery Set: Includes 100 spoons, 100 knives, and 100 forks, providing a full set of clear plastic cutlery for all your dining needs.
Durable Heavy-Duty Quality: Crafted from high-quality plastic, this cutlery set is sturdy and built to last, ensuring reliable performance at any event.
Reusable & Dishwasher Safe: Designed for multiple uses, each piece of cutlery can be easily cleaned in the dishwasher, making them an eco-friendly choice.
Elegant Clear Design: The sleek and clear design of the cutlery adds a touch of sophistication to any table setting, perfect for formal and casual occasions.
Convenient Pack of 300: This combo pack of 300 pieces ensures you have plenty of cutlery on hand for large gatherings, minimizing the need for frequent reorders.
description: Product Description Premium Quality Material Crafted from durable, heavy-duty clear plastic, these utensils are designed to withstand frequent use and resist breaking. Comprehensive Cutlery Set Enjoy the convenience of a complete cutlery set with 50 spoons, 50 knives, and 50 forks, perfect for all your dining needs. Reusable Promote sustainability with reusable cutlery that is dishwasher safe, reducing single-use plastic waste. Crystal Clear Elegance Enhance your table setting with the sleek and elegant look of crystal-clear cutlery, suitable for any occasion. Versatile Use Ideal for weddings, parties, picnics, office events, and everyday dining, offering versatility and practicality. Easily clean and reuse your cutlery with the convenience of dishwasher-safe plastic, saving you time and effort. Sturdy & Reliable Experience the reliability of cutlery that won't bend or snap, ensuring a pleasant dining experience for your guests. The lightweight design makes it easy to transport and set up for outdoor events, picnics, and catering services. Hygienic & Safe The minimalist design complements any table setting, adding a touch of sophistication to your dining experience. Accommodate large groups with this comprehensive set, ensuring you have enough utensils for all your guests.
